home.title: Nearest AEDs
home.hint: Tap a marker or card for details and navigation.
home.noLocationHint: Share your location to see nearby AEDs and distances.
home.geoError: Location unavailable — showing all verified AEDs.
home.geoDenied: Location access was blocked. Enable it in your browser settings, then tap Share location again.
home.geoTimeout: Could not determine your location in time — try again.
home.empty: No verified AEDs in this area yet.

aed.mayCloseBeforeArrival: May become inaccessible before you arrive

report.title: Report AED
report.subtitle: Help others in emergencies. Submissions are reviewed before appearing on the map.
report.locationOnSiteHint: *You must be at the defibrillator's location. Remote submission is not supported.
report.locationNamePlaceholder: e.g. Metro Station Mladost 1, Mall of Sofia, Kaufland Sofia
report.descriptionRestrictedPlaceholder: Describe how to get access (e.g. ask reception, security desk, get to 2-nd floor, key card)...
report.descriptionIssuePlaceholder: Describe the issue (incorrect information, unavailable or damaged AED, duplicate AED, or any other problem).
report.relatedAedSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, address, or ID…
report.reporterLocationHint: Optional — helps us understand where you reported from.
report.successIssueSubmitted: Thank you! We'll review your report.
report.openingHoursFormat: Select times using 24-hour dropdowns (00–23 hours, 00–59 minutes).
report.openingHoursHelp: Leave both dropdowns as — for closed days. At least one open day is required.
report.uploadingMessage: Uploading your report and photos. Please wait, this might take up to 1 minute
report.successPendingApproval: Thank you! Your report was submitted and is pending admin approval before it appears on the map.

errors.geoUnsupported: Geolocation is not supported on this device.
errors.geoFailed: Could not get your location. Enable location services.
errors.openingHoursRequired: Please enter opening hours for at least one day.
errors.openingHoursIncomplete: Each day needs both open and close times selected, or leave both as —.
errors.relatedAedLoadFailed: Could not load AED list. Please try again.
errors.submissionFailedMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.serverErrorMessage: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.imageRequired: Please upload at least one photo of the AED.
errors.imageTooLarge: Image must be {{maxMb}} MB or smaller.
errors.imageTooMany: You can upload at most {{max}} photos. Remove extra photos and try again.
errors.imageType: Invalid image type. Use JPEG, PNG, or WebP.

auth.subtitle: Save submissions and access admin tools when authorized.
auth.toggleToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

admin.title: Admin review
admin.subtitle: Review pending AED submissions and problem reports.

maps.missingKey: Set VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY in frontend/.env to load Google Maps.

errors.serverMessage: We couldn't load AED locations right now. Please try again in a moment.
errors.nearestFailed: We couldn't refresh the nearest locations. Showing the last results we have.

apiErrors.imageRequired: Please upload at least one photo of the AED.
apiErrors.openingHoursRequired: Please enter opening hours for at least one day.
apiErrors.openingHoursInvalid: Opening hours are invalid. Please check your entries.
apiErrors.wrongReportEndpoint: This report type must be submitted from the problem report form.
apiErrors.restrictedDescriptionRequired: Please describe how to get access for restricted locations.
apiErrors.relatedAedNotFound: The selected AED could not be found.
apiErrors.spamDetected: Your submission could not be accepted. Please revise the text and try again.
apiErrors.gcsUploadRequired: Photo upload failed. Please try submitting again.
apiErrors.tempKeysGcsOnly: Photo upload failed. Please try submitting again.
apiErrors.imageType: Invalid image type. Use JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
apiErrors.imageTooLarge: Image must be {{maxMb}} MB or smaller.
apiErrors.imageInvalid: One or more images could not be accepted.
apiErrors.imageProcessingFailed: One or more images could not be processed. Please try again.
apiErrors.reporterLocationIncomplete: Location must include both latitude and longitude.
apiErrors.directUploadDisabled: Photo uploads are not available right now. Please try again later.
apiErrors.storageUnavailable: Photo uploads are not available right now. Please try again later.
apiErrors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

apiWarnings.pendingReview: An admin will review your submission before it appears on the map.
apiWarnings.duplicateNearby: Another AED is already registered within {{meters}} m.

common.errorMessage: Please refresh the page. If the problem continues, try again later.
